title: Cobblemon Infinite
body:
# **Official pack of the Cobblemon Infinite server**
Infinite Regions, Infinite Adventures. Every player runs their own region, but every player gets to challenge it to take control. While competitive, the mod pack is designed for all players, so you can write stories and build monuments in the chaos.

## **Build Regions**
Cobblemon Infinite is designed for each player to build a custom region from scratch, with mods like [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs), and [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted).

## **Become an Entrepreneur**
Industrialize with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), and sell your goods to the world with [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul).

## **join the community** 
Opportunities await. The Infinite server is always open to newcomers! With mods such as [Open parties and claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) everyone has a safe space to grow their knowledge as a trainer.
